T066_ambient_audio.details: startAmbient(type)/stopAmbient() added to SFXManager.ts. Shared AudioContext (sharedCtx). Menu: 55Hz sine drone + 2x harmonic + lowpass wind noise 400Hz cutoff. Forest: 65Hz drone + 350Hz wind + random bird chirps every 4-12s. 2s fade-in on master gain (gain 0.05). stopAmbient(): 1.5s fade-out then disconnects all nodes + cancels bird timer. Wired in main.ts: startAmbient('menu') on menu entry, stopAmbient() on Start click, startAmbient('forest') after sceneManager.start().

T068_effect_preview.details: buildEffectTooltip() in CardOverlay.ts parses effect strings (HEAL_LIFE/DAMAGE_LIFE/ADD_REPUTATION/PROMISE). Tooltip div appended inside .card-option, opacity:0 default, opacity:1 on CSS :hover. Color-coded via .effect-pos/.effect-neg/.effect-neu classes. Mobile: repositions below button via @media max-width:700px.

T069_boot_skip.details: runBootScreen() wraps wait in Promise with resolved-flag guard. Resolves on click, keydown, or 2.6s auto — whichever first. Both listeners explicitly removed on resolve to prevent listener leak.

bundle_delta: +4KB vs cycle 23 (111KB) — within 5% WARN, no BLOCK
code_review_findings: FIXED: T069 listener leak — resolved flag + removeEventListener on both click and keydown
LOW: parseEffect uses innerHTML with server-controlled strings — acceptable risk, no user input path
LOW: eff as string cast in buildEffectTooltip is redundant but harmless (effects already readonly string[])
